name: Claritev Corp
summary: Our Business and Market Opportunity Claritev Corporation is a technology, data and insights company focused on improving transparency, affordability and quality across the healthcare system. Claritev brings objective, market-based insights to some of the healthcare system's most complex decisions - grounded in decades of claims experience. By applying data, analytics and experience, Claritev helps organizations across the healthcare ecosystem better understand costs, pricing and payment dynamics...
